title: Siege Of Djklxprwbz, The
content:
Before a Turkish town
        The Russians came.
    And with huge cannon
        Did bombard the same.

    They got up close
        And rained fat bombshells down,
    And blew out every
        Vowel in the town.

    And then the Turks,
        Becoming somewhat sad,
    Surrendered every
        Consonant they had.

     Eugene Fitch Ware.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Eugene Fitch Ware delivers a powerful performance in "Siege Of Djklxprwbz, The"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
